All goes silky smooth until his cover is blown when he's recognised by a Palestinian cab driver. Now, the Zohan must fight to live a peaceful new life in New York in this razor-sharp action-packed comedy.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: Ghostbusters Inc has gone bust, but its members get a second chance in this knockabout sequel to the smash hit of 1984 when a ghostly 16th-century tyrant starts going medieval on the streets of Manhattan. Its first target is a single mum who knows she's in trouble when flowing pink slime contaminates her toddler's stroller. Who's she gonna call?

programme.title: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Male nurse Greg Focker is poised to propose to his girlfriend Pam during a weekend stay at her parents' home. But here's the catch he needs to ask her father first. Alas, the fur flies as Jack Byrnes, Pam's cat-crazy, ex-CIA father takes an immediate dislike to her less-than-truthful beau. Greg's quest for approval gets seriously side-tracked as Murphy's Law takes over and a hilarious string of mishaps turns him into a master of disaster and total pariah in the eyes of the entire family, all except for his shell-shocked girlfriend, who can't believe she still lovers her one-man wrecking crew.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: For the third time, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: Identity Thief
programme.desc: Unlimited funds have allowed Diana to live it up on the outskirts of Orlando. There's only one glitch: she's financing her shopping sprees with an ID stolen from Sandy Patterson, an accounts rep who lives halfway across the US. With only one week to hunt down the con artist before his world implodes, the real Sandy Patterson is forced to extreme measures to clear his name.

programme.title: National Security
programme.desc: LAPD reject and major troublemaker, Earl, got LA cop Hank kicked off the force for brutality. Now, these two guys, who can't stand each other, are stuck working together as lowly security guards. And they're playing cops to bring down a smuggling ring if they can stay alive and stay one step ahead of the real cops.

Just remember: it's funny because it's true.

programme.title: Spit
programme.desc: An ex-con returns to Australia after 20 years, and gets detained. He faces old enemies, makes new friends in detention, and teaches his version of Australian mateship while staying one step ahead.

programme.title: You Don't Mess with the Zohan
programme.desc: The Zohan is the finest counterterrorist agent the Israeli army has. That is, until he fakes his death and travels to Manhattan to live his dream as a hairdresser. Now this skilled fighting machine who used to clip bad guys is out to prove he can make the cut as a top stylist. All goes silky smooth until his cover is blown when he's recognised by a Palestinian cab driver. Now, the Zohan must fight to live a peaceful new life in New York in this razor-sharp action-packed comedy.

programme.title: Zombieland: Double Tap
programme.desc: Through comic mayhem from the White House to the heartland, four slayers face off against new kinds of evolved zombies and new human survivors.

programme.title: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Male nurse Greg Focker is poised to propose to his girlfriend Pam during a weekend stay at her parents' home. But here's the catch he needs to ask her father first. Alas, the fur flies as Jack Byrnes, Pam's cat-crazy, ex-CIA father takes an immediate dislike to her less-than-truthful beau. Greg's quest for approval gets seriously side-tracked as Murphy's Law takes over and a hilarious string of mishaps turns him into a master of disaster and total pariah in the eyes of the entire family, all except for his shell-shocked girlfriend, who can't believe she still lovers her one-man wrecking crew.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: The plan was flawless. The execution was perfect. Charlie Croker pulled off the crime of a lifetime. The one thing that, he didn't plan on was being double-crossed. Now he wants more than the job's payoff he wants payback.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: Jack Harper is the lone security repairman stationed on a desolate, nearly-ruined future Earth. When he rescues a beautiful stranger from a downed spacecraft, her arrival triggers a nonstop chain of events that forces him to question everything he knows, and leaves humanity's fate in his hands.

programme.title: War Of The Worlds (2005)
programme.desc: Ray Ferrier is a working class man living in New Jersey. He's estranged from his family, his life isn't in order, and he's too caught up with himself. But the unthinkable and ultimately the unexpected happens to him in an extraordinary sense. His small town life is shaken violently by the arrival of destructive intruders: Aliens which have come in masses to destroy the planet. As they plough through the country in a wave of mass destruction and violence, Ray must come to the defence of his children. As the world must fend for itself by a new and very advanced enemy not of this world, its inhabitants must save humanity from a far greater force than threatens to destroy it.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: Wesley's life is over, his pathetic old one, anyway. Fortunately, it is all because of a girl. Enter sizzling-hot Fox, who crashes into his life and introduces him to the Fraternity, a secret society of assassins, led by the enigmatic Sloan. Seems Wes's long-lost father was killed while working for the Fraternity and Wes has been selected to target the rogue member who murdered him. But before he can complete his assignment, Wes must first uncover the dark secrets behind the Fraternity in order to determine his own destiny.

programme.title: Hummingbird
programme.desc: After returning from Afghanistan disillusioned and homeless, an ex-Special Forces soldier returns home a damaged man, struggling to find justice in a world saturated with violence in this gritty, explosive story about London's criminal underworld.

programme.title: A Quiet Place
programme.desc: If they hear you, they hunt you. In this terrifyingly suspenseful thriller, a family must navigate their lives in silence to avoid mysterious creatures that hunt by sound. Knowing that even the slightest whisper or footstep can bring death, Evelyn and Lee Abbott are determined to find a way to protect their children at all costs while they desperately search for a way to fight back.

programme.title: Pain & Gain
programme.desc: Based on the unbelievable true story. A group of personal trainers in 1990s Miami, who in pursuit of the American dream get caught up in a criminal enterprise that goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: In the year 2154, two classes of people exist: the very wealthy, who live on a pristine man-made space station called Elysium, and the rest, who live on an overpopulated, ruined Earth. The people of Earth are desperate to escape the planet's crime and poverty, and they critically need the state-of-the-art medical care available on Elysium - but some in Elysium will stop at nothing to enforce anti-immigration laws and preserve their citizens' luxurious lifestyle. The only man with the chance bring equality to these worlds is Max, an ordinary guy in desperate need to get to Elysium. With his life hanging in the balance, he reluctantly takes on a dangerous mission - one that pits him against Elysium's Secretary Delacourt and her hard-line forces - but if he succeeds, he could save not only his own life, but millions of people on Earth as well.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Blamed for the terrorist bombing of the Kremlin, IMF operative Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise) is disavowed along with the rest of the agency when the President initiates 'Ghost Protocol'. Left without any resources or backup, Ethan must find a way to clear his agency's name and prevent another attack. To complicate matters further, Ethan is forced to embark on this mission with a team of fellow IMF fugitives whose personal motives he does not fully know.

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: Over one day across the streets of LA, three lives will change forever. Desperate brothers hijack an ambulance after their heist goes awry, spiralling into the most insane escape.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: When detectives Ricardo Tubbs and Sonny Crockett are asked to investigate the brutal murders of two federal agents, they find themselves pulled into the lethal world of drug traffickers.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Born in hell and bred to be evil, Hellboy was rescued by a benevolent doctor who raised him to be a hero. Now he must thwart a madman who wants to steal his powers and destroy mankind.

programme.title: The Green Hornet
programme.desc: Britt Reid is a slacker by day, party animal by night, until he finds a serious career that's seriously cool: crime-fighting action hero. As the Green Hornet, he teams up with gadget wiz and martial arts master Kato to take down LA's underworld.

programme.title: Skyscraper
programme.desc: Former FBI Hostage Rescue Team leader and U.S. war veteran Will Sawyer now assesses security for skyscrapers. On assignment in Hong Kong he finds the tallest, safest building in the world, The Pearl, suddenly ablaze, and he's been framed for it. A wanted man on the run, Will must find those responsible, clear his name and somehow rescue his family who is trapped inside the building above the fire line.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: For centuries, two races of robotic aliens have waged a war with the fate of the universe at stake. When the battle comes to Earth, all that stands between the evil Decepticons and ultimate power is a clue held by a young teenager, Sam. Unaware that he alone is mankind's last chance for survival, Sam finds himself in a struggle between the Autobots and Decepticons with the world hanging in the balance.

programme.title: xXx 3: Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: Extreme athlete turned government operative Xander Cage - thought to be long dead - comes out of self-imposed exile and is set on a collision course with deadly alpha warrior Xiang and his team, in a race to recover a sinister and seemingly unstoppable weapon known as Pandora's Box. Recruiting an all-new group of thrill-seeking cohorts, Xander finds himself enmeshed in a deadly conspiracy that points to collusion at the highest levels of world governments.

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: A military cop becomes involved in a deadly game of cat-and-mouse when five people are randomly murdered by a sniper.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: Based on the character created by bestselling author Tom Clancy, Jack Ryan is a global action thriller set in the present day. This original story follows a young Jack as he uncovers a financial terrorist plot. The story follows him from 9/11, through his tour of duty in Afghanistan, which scarred him forever, and into his early days in the Financial Intelligence Unit of the modern CIA where he becomes an analyst, under the guardianship of his handler, Harper. When Ryan believes he's uncovered a Russian plot to collapse the United States economy, he goes from being an analyst to becoming a spy and must fight to save his own life and those of countless others, while also trying to protect the thing that's more important to him than anything, his relationship with his fiancee Cathy.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug, is an unlucky fixer determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs gone off the rails. Fate may have other plans, as Ladybug's latest mission puts him on a collision course with 10 deadly and diverse assassins, all with connected, yet conflicting objectives and tests his newfound philosophy in this non-stop thrill ride through modern-day Japan.

programme.title: F9: The Fast Saga
programme.desc: The true meaning of family gets tested like never before as Dom Toretto takes the team on a worldwide ride with high-stakes action, old friends and a surprising new foe.

programme.title: Nobody
programme.desc: After failing to fight for his family during a robbery, an unassuming father calls on skills from his hidden past to become a lethal vigilante blazing a wild ride to revenge.

programme.title: Robin Hood (2010)
programme.desc: Robin Hood, the legendary figure of 13th century England, who along with his band of marauders confront corruption in the local village of Nottingham and lead an uprising against the crown that will forever alter the balance of world power. Whether regarded as thief or hero, one man from humble beginnings will become an eternal symbol of freedom for his people.

programme.title: Great White
programme.desc: A flight to a remote atoll turns into a nightmare for five passengers when their seaplane is destroyed and they're trapped on a raft, 160km from shore, with sharks lurking beneath them.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson stars as Driver who, after spending 10 years in prison, is intent on avenging the murder of his brother during the botched bank robbery that led to his imprisonment. He has a list of names to eliminate, but a veteran cop on the eve of retirement and a professional assassin who is passionate about his job are both on his tail. As Driver seeks out the people on his list, the details about the circumstances in which his brother was killed becomes muddled and it seems that his list may be incomplete.

programme.title: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: Johnny Blaze was only a teenage stunt biker when he sold his soul to the devil. Years later, Johnny is a world renowned daredevil by day, but at night, he becomes the Ghost Rider of Marvel Comics legend. The devil's bounty hunter, he is charged with finding evil souls on earth and bringing them to hell. But when a twist of fate brings Johnny's long-lost love back into his life, Johnny realises he just might have a second chance at happiness - if he can beat the devil and win back his soul. To do so he'll have to defeat Blackheart, the devil's nemesis and wayward son, whose plot to take over his father's realm will bring hell on earth - unless Ghost Rider can stop him.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Eddie Brock is a broken man after he loses everything including his job and fiancee. Just when his life is at its lowest, he becomes host to an alien symbiote which results in extraordinary superpowers - transforming him into Venom. Will these powers be enough for this new lethal protector to defeat great evil forces, especially against the far stronger and more weaponized symbiote rival, Riot?

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen
programme.desc: When college-bound Sam Witwicky learns the truth about the ancient origins of the Transformers, he must accept his destiny and join Optimus Prime and Bumblebee in their epic battle against the Decepticons, who have returned stronger than ever with a plan to destroy our world.

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: The year is 1936, Indiana Jones hears from a museum curator named Marcus Brody about a biblical artefact called The Ark of the Covenant, which can hold the key to humanly existence. Joined with Marion Ravenwood and Sallah, Jones ventures to vast places such as Nepal and Egypt to find this artefact. He will have to fight his enemy Belloq and a band of Nazis for the Lost Ark.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: On the turbo-charged streets of Los Angeles, every night is a championship race. With nitro-boosted fury, Dominic Toretto rules the road, turning all his challengers into dust. He and his rival, Johnny Tran, are the boldest, the baddest, and the best, but now there's new rage on the road. They know he's tough, they know he's fast, but what they don't know is that he's a speed demon detective with enough drive and determination to come out the winner.

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: When a small town police chief arrests a vagrant hitchhiker, little does he know that he has set in motion a catastrophic series of events. The vagrant in question is in fact John Rambo. Rambo makes a daring escape from the small town jail to the shelter of the mountains and prepares himself for a one man war.

programme.title: World War Z
programme.desc: The story revolves around United Nations employee Gerry Lane, who traverses the world in a race against time to stop a pandemic that is toppling armies and governments and threatening to decimate humanity itself.

programme.title: Dead Again in Tombstone
programme.desc: After saving himself from an eternity in Hell, Guerrero continues to roam the Wild West collecting bounties on behalf of Lucifer.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: It's the nitro-fuelled answer to the question: how fast do you like it? Now an ex-cop on the run, Brian O'Connor hooks into outlaw street-racing. When the Feds strong-arm him back, O'Connor's no rules, win-or-die skills are unleashed against an international drug lord. With his velocity-addicted buddy riding shotgun, and a drop-dead-gorgeous undercover agent dialling up the heat, this film accelerates the action into a desperate race for survival, justice and mind-blowing, jaw-dropping speed.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: Phillip Noyce directs Angelina Jolie as Evelyn Salt, a CIA officer who swore an oath to duty, honour and country. When she is accused by a defector of being a Russian sleeper spy, Salt goes on the run to clear her name and ultimately prove her loyalty. Using all her skills and years of experience as a covert operative, she must elude capture and protect her family or the world's most powerful forces will erase any trace of her existence. With her superiors convinced she's out to assassinate the president, she also must race the clock to learn the identity of the real traitor.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
programme.desc: On a dangerous assignment to recover stolen plutonium, Ethan Hunt chooses to save his team over completing the mission, allowing nuclear weapons to fall into the hands of a deadly network of highly-skilled operatives intent on destroying civilization. Now, with the world at risk, Ethan and his IMF team are forced to become reluctant partners with a hard-hitting CIA agent as they race against time to stop the nuclear fallout. There's never been a threat more destructive, stunts so jaw-dropping in the film critics are calling the best "Mission" yet!

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The greatest adventure of all time begins with a young crew's maiden voyage on board the most advanced starship ever created: the USS Enterprise. In the midst of an incredible journey full of optimism, intrigue, comedy and cosmic peril, the new recruits must find a way to stop an evil being whose mission of vengeance threatens all of mankind. The fate of the galaxy rests in the hands of bitter rivals born worlds apart.

programme.title: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Beck is a bounty hunter sent into the treacherous jungles of the Amazon to bring the rebellious Travis back to the States. When Beck and Travis reluctantly join forces to hunt down a priceless treasure, this unlikely team embarks on a pulse-pounding, nonstop thrill ride.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth
programme.desc: Zora Bennett leads a team to a deadly island lab to retrieve dinosaur DNA with life-saving potential, but they uncover a shocking secret buried for decades.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons' all-consuming evil.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: After barely escaping a raging Shanghai nightclub brawl, Indy crash-lands into the wilds of India where he uncovers a sinister scheme that has enslaved a remote village's children in a fortress-like mine. Indy must save the children and avoid becoming a slave himself to the evil Thuggee cult.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: In the brand new adventure Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle, the tables are turned as four teenagers are sucked into the world of Jumanji. When four high-school kids discover an old video game console with a game they've never heard of Jumanji they are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, literally becoming the avatars they chose: gamer Spencer becomes a brawny adventurer; football jock Fridge loses (in his words) 'the top two feet of his body' and becomes an Einstein; popular girl Bethany becomes a middle-aged male professor; and wallflower Martha becomes a badass warrior. What they discover is that you don't just play Jumanji you must survive it. To beat the game and return to the real world, they'll have to go on the most dangerous adventure of their lives, discover what Alan Parrish left 20 years ago, and change the way they think about themselves or they'll be stuck in the game forever.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: Vietnam veteran John Rambo is offered a prison pardon in exchange for a perilous mission: infiltrating communist Vietnam under deep cover to hunt for evidence of missing American servicement. His CIA handler Marshall Murdock insists that it is merely a reconnaissance operation. "Do not engage the enemy," Rambo is ordered, "Just take pictures." After a disastrous parachute drop, Rambo is left stranded in the jungles with only his combat knife and bow and arrows to protect him.

programme.title: Dracula Untold
programme.desc: The year is 1462 and Transylvania has enjoyed a prolonged period of peace under the just and fair rule of the battle-weary Vlad III, the prince of Wallachia. But when Sultan Mehmed II demands 1000 of Wallachia's boys including Vlad's own son to become child soldiers in his army, Vlad must enter into a Faustian bargain to save his family and his people. He gains the strength of 100 men, the speed of a falling star and the power to crush his enemies. In exchange, he's inflicted with an insatiable thirst for human blood that could force him into a life of darkness and destroy all that he holds dear.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
programme.desc: Survivors try to uncover the truth behind the evil Umbrella Corp while battling bloodthirsty zombies in the wastelands of Raccoon City.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: Now that Dom and Letty are married, Brian and Mia have retired from the game, and the rest of the crew have been exonerated, the globetrotting team has found a semblance of a normal life. But when a mysterious woman seduces Dom into the world of crime he can't seem to escape, they will face trials that will test them as never before. From the shores of Cuba and the streets of New York City to the icy plains off the arctic Barents Sea, our elite force will criss-cross the globe to stop an anarchist from unleashing chaos on the world's stage, and bring home the man who made them a family.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A documentary film crew, headed by anthropologist Steve Cale and director Terri Flores, ventures into the world's most isolated jungle - the Amazon - in search of a lost and forgotten civilisation. Early in their journey, they come to the aid of Paul Serone, a Paraguayan guide, who joins their expedition. But Serone is actually a poacher on the trail of a legendary snake. When Serone hijacks the boat and its crew on his quest to track and kill the giant snake, he steers the expedition right into the path of the deadly monster.

programme.title: R.I.P.D.
programme.desc: Two cops are dispatched by the otherworldly Rest In Peace Department to protect and serve the living from an increasingly destructive array of souls who refuse to move peacefully to the other side. Veteran sheriff Roy Pulsifer has spent his career with the legendary police force known as RIPD, tracking monstrous spirits who are cleverly disguised as ordinary people.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: MI6's most lethal assassin is sent on a covert mission into Cold War Berlin where she must use all of the spy-craft, sensuality, and savagery she has to stay alive.

programme.title: Bastille Day
programme.desc: When a reckless CIA agent and a brilliant pickpocket uncover a large-scale conspiracy, they must work together in order to take down a common enemy.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: When an attempt to take down a drug cartel blows up in their faces, two undercover operatives are forced to go on the run together, though neither knows that the other is a federal agent. Suddenly, everyone on both sides of the law wants them dead, and their only hope is to trust each other.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug, is an unlucky fixer determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs gone off the rails. Fate may have other plans, as Ladybug's latest mission puts him on a collision course with 10 deadly and diverse assassins, all with connected, yet conflicting objectives and tests his newfound philosophy in this non-stop thrill ride through modern-day Japan.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: This film begins after an epic battle left a great city torn, but with the world saved. As humanity picks up the pieces, a shadowy group reveals itself in an attempt to control the direction of history while an ancient, powerful new menace sets Earth in its crosshairs. With help from a new cast of humans, Optimus Prime and the Autobots rise to meet their most fearsome challenge yet. In an incredible adventure, they are swept up in a war of good and evil, ultimately leading to a climactic battle across the world.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: The year is 1939, Indiana Jones and museum curator Marcus Brody venture to Italy in search of Dr Henry Jones, Indy's father. The rescue mission turns into a race to find the Holy Grail before the Nazi's. With Dr Jones's diary as a vital key and the map with no names as a guide, Indiana once again finds himself in another death defying adventure of pure excitement.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: The gang is back but the game has changed. They discover that nothing is as they expect, as they try to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Rambo has withdrawn to a Buddhist monastery in Thailand, but his mentor, Colonel Trautman, asks him to help carry out a dangerous mission in Afghanistan. The Vietnam vet refuses. He has found peace, serenity, and is non-violent. Trautman attempts the mission alone, but is captured by the Soviets and is harshly interrogated by the cruel Colonel Zaysen. The CIA can do nothing and call upon Rambo. He needs a few moments to choose his weapons and bind his muscles before hitting his enemies like a hurricane, and in a few days he ravages the country.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: The plan was flawless. The execution was perfect. Charlie Croker pulled off the crime of a lifetime. The one thing that, he didn't plan on was being double-crossed. Now he wants more than the job's payoff he wants payback.

programme.title: The Invitation
programme.desc: After the death of her mother, Evie is approached by an unknown cousin who invites her to a lavish wedding in the English countryside. Soon, she realises a gothic conspiracy is afoot and must fight for survival as she uncovers twisted secrets in her family's history.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: When detectives Ricardo Tubbs and Sonny Crockett are asked to investigate the brutal murders of two federal agents, they find themselves pulled into the lethal world of drug traffickers.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson stars as Driver who, after spending 10 years in prison, is intent on avenging the murder of his brother during the botched bank robbery that led to his imprisonment. He has a list of names to eliminate, but a veteran cop on the eve of retirement and a professional assassin who is passionate about his job are both on his tail. As Driver seeks out the people on his list, the details about the circumstances in which his brother was killed becomes muddled and it seems that his list may be incomplete.

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: Over one day across the streets of LA, three lives will change forever. Desperate brothers hijack an ambulance after their heist goes awry, spiralling into the most insane escape.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder victim turns out to be a violent stalker, and the killer may be one of his stalking victims who learned to cover her tracks by attending one of Bonasera's college seminars.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man is killed when he falls out a window in media mogul Robert Dunbrook's building, but did Dunbrook throw him?

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder leads CSI to a group of white supremacists, the discovery of precious items stolen from Holocaust survivors, and perhaps the uncovering of a former Nazi guard.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: As Lindsay goes into labour, Mac suspects that a man who served a prison sentence in a manslaughter case is protecting the actual culprit.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella discovers that her old friend, Professor Papakota, may be connected to the Greek antiquities smuggling ring and travels to Greece to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A group of violent kidnappers capture Robert Dunbrook's son just before he is scheduled to testify against his father to a grand jury, and the CSI team is rocked by a tragedy.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The death of a Ukrainian man helps CSI uncover a sex trafficking ring.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the deputy mayor is killed, suspicion quickly falls on a sleazy newspaper publisher.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The lab tackles a case involving a murdered Internet entrepreneur whose body has been picked apart by vultures.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: An environmental terrorist group bombs the home of an electronics recycler, and his daughter is killed - but the daughter is part of the terrorist group.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The lab makes a grisly discovery while investigating the death of a former medical examiner office employee's wife, and Stella sets up a trap for the Greek coin thieves.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: CSI tries to figure who is responsible for the death of the chief of a Native American tribe that was one of the original inhabitants of Manhattan.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder victim turns out to be a violent stalker, and the killer may be one of his stalking victims who learned to cover her tracks by attending one of Bonasera's college seminars.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man is killed when he falls out a window in media mogul Robert Dunbrook's building, but did Dunbrook throw him?

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder leads CSI to a group of white supremacists, the discovery of precious items stolen from Holocaust survivors, and perhaps the uncovering of a former Nazi guard.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: As Lindsay goes into labour, Mac suspects that a man who served a prison sentence in a manslaughter case is protecting the actual culprit.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder victim turns out to be a violent stalker, and the killer may be one of his stalking victims who learned to cover her tracks by attending one of Bonasera's college seminars.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man is killed when he falls out a window in media mogul Robert Dunbrook's building, but did Dunbrook throw him?

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder leads CSI to a group of white supremacists, the discovery of precious items stolen from Holocaust survivors, and perhaps the uncovering of a former Nazi guard.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: As Lindsay goes into labour, Mac suspects that a man who served a prison sentence in a manslaughter case is protecting the actual culprit.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella discovers that her old friend, Professor Papakota, may be connected to the Greek antiquities smuggling ring and travels to Greece to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A group of violent kidnappers capture Robert Dunbrook's son just before he is scheduled to testify against his father to a grand jury, and the CSI team is rocked by a tragedy.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Following a spray of machine gunfire, the CSI team rises from the chaos. However, when one member's life is changed, it proves to be the emotional motivation they need to piece together their lives and find the shooter.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The case of a cyber killer, who appears to be targeting medical health care workers, turns personal when the suspect invokes the name of Mac's father who had died nearly two decades earlier.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the crime lab deal with a killer who is using compasses to leave clues to his crimes.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: While investigating the DNA from a murder scene, Hawkes discovers that the DNA is connected to more than a dozen cases over a three state area.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: CSI investigates the homicide of a competitive street dancer, which leads the team to an unlikely killer who has a shocking motive.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a software company executive bleeds to death on a Manhattan street, the CSI's must delve into the wet and messy world of food parties , where groups of people experience food in an sensual way.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A big rig accident results in the discovery of an interstate trucking ring that specialises in human cargo and black market organ harvesting, and sets off a race against time to save a hostage.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After a body falls from the 59th Street Bridge, the CSI team finds a compass near the body pointing east, and realises it's the third victim of the Compass Killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the team lose the Compass Killer at the World's Fair site, and they soon discover through the use of astronomy and sunrises that it's only a matter of time before he targets the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mummified remains are found in a booby-trapped Manhattan penthouse that has been closed off for more than 80 years, and Mac and Stella race against time to find the people who discovered the body.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: CSI uncovers a plot to collect millions of dollars in life insurance after a reformed homeless man is found dead in an alley.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder trial is delayed and the suspect is released on bail after Stella discovers that the district attorney in the case tampered with the crime scene for personal gain.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Following a spray of machine gunfire, the CSI team rises from the chaos. However, when one member's life is changed, it proves to be the emotional motivation they need to piece together their lives and find the shooter.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The case of a cyber killer, who appears to be targeting medical health care workers, turns personal when the suspect invokes the name of Mac's father who had died nearly two decades earlier.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the crime lab deal with a killer who is using compasses to leave clues to his crimes.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: While investigating the DNA from a murder scene, Hawkes discovers that the DNA is connected to more than a dozen cases over a three state area.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: CSI investigates the homicide of a competitive street dancer, which leads the team to an unlikely killer who has a shocking motive.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a software company executive bleeds to death on a Manhattan street, the CSI's must delve into the wet and messy world of food parties , where groups of people experience food in an sensual way.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A big rig accident results in the discovery of an interstate trucking ring that specialises in human cargo and black market organ harvesting, and sets off a race against time to save a hostage.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After a body falls from the 59th Street Bridge, the CSI team finds a compass near the body pointing east, and realises it's the third victim of the Compass Killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the team lose the Compass Killer at the World's Fair site, and they soon discover through the use of astronomy and sunrises that it's only a matter of time before he targets the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mummified remains are found in a booby-trapped Manhattan penthouse that has been closed off for more than 80 years, and Mac and Stella race against time to find the people who discovered the body.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a beautiful star quarterback of the Lingerie Football League is found murdered in the locker room hot tub with traces of lidocaine in her system, the CSIs are called in to find out who wanted her dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a young woman's body is found in Central Park, drained of blood and missing part of her ear, the CSIs jump start an investigation that takes them into the dark and mysterious subculture of vampirism.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team tries to figure out who rigged a race car to go up in flames and leave its legendary driver in critical condition.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team must unravel the series of events from a wild night for a group of friends, a night which ended in four dead bodies, and a fifth person wandering the streets covered in blood and wielding an axe.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team discovers that a double homicide is related to an investigation by a pair of journalist bloggers into fraud by a company that makes gold bullion.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Sid rules the death of a woman whose twin brother disappeared 15 years ago a suicide, but Stella is convinced that he is wrong and sets out to prove it.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Dr Hawkes is trapped in a cell block during a security breach orchestrated by a familiar face from CSI's past, and the only person who can help him get to safety is the death row inmate who murdered his sister.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team uncovers an underground fighting league after they discover the body of a retired boxer buried under concrete at a construction site.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A teen is critically injured after being shot in an alleyway. The victim's younger brother witnessed the crime, but he cannot give an accurate description of the incident and shooter to the police.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder is connected to suspicious behaviour that Mac spies from his apartment while recovering from an injury, and his ex-girlfriend Peyton Driscoll may be connected to the case.

programme.desc: A mother identifies her son as the attacker in a brutal assault that left her seriously injured and her husband dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.desc: A married couple is led to believe that they have found their badly decomposed dead son in a car on the roof of a Wall Street building.

programme.desc: Mac is on the hunt for a sniper who is using nitroglycerin in his bullets to explode on impact, and the prime suspect was once a missing boy from one of Mac's old cases.

programme.desc: As the CSIs investigate a case involving a woman who appears to have been scared to death in a supposedly haunted section of Central Park, Mac stumbles on another dead body buried nearby.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After the woman who assumed Chief of Detectives Carver's deceased sister's identity turns up dead, and the evidence continues to mount, Mac begins to suspect that Carver may have been responsible for both murders.

programme.desc: After Raymond Harris retaliates against Mac and his retired first partner, Mac begins to discover more about Harris's motives and his ex-partner's dirty laundry.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After Mac is nearly killed trying to apprehend a criminal, he decides to tackle a cold case involving a double homicide and child abduction during a bodega robbery.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: On the 10th anniversary of 9/11, Mac and the team remember specific moments from that day that were indelibly burned in their mind.

programme.title: Love and Friendship
programme.desc: Set in the 1790s, earlier than most Austen tales, this film concerns beautiful young widow Lady Susan Vernon who has come to Churchill, the estate of her in-laws, to wait out colourful rumours about her dalliances circulating through polite society. While ensconced there, she decides to secure a husband for herself and for her daughter, Frederica. The waters are troubled by the arrival at Churchill of the handsome, eligible Reginald DeCourcy and silly but cheerful, and very rich, Sir James Martin.

programme.title: What We Did on Our Holiday
programme.desc: Doug and Abi are taking their three children on a trip to Scotland for a big family gathering. They are in the midst of a difficult divorce, and have asked the kids to keep it a secret from their extended family. But as the inevitable feuds kick in, a completely unexpected turn of events involving the children causes further tensions to rise to the surface. And with the repercussions that ensue - hilarious and emotional in equal measure - the family are forced to put aside their differences and work together or else risk losing what they hold most dear.

programme.title: Vita and Virginia
programme.desc: Virginia Wolf meets fellow author Vita Sackville-West in London in the 1920s. Despite both of them being married, they embark on an affair that later inspires one of Virginia's novels.

programme.title: Journey's End
programme.desc: March, 1918. C-company arrives to take its turn in the front-line trenches in northern France, led by the war-weary Captain Stanhope. A German offensive is imminent, and the officers and their cook distract themselves in their dugout with talk of food and their past lives. Stanhope, meanwhile, soaks his fear in whisky, unable to deal with his dread of the inevitable. A young new officer, Raleigh, has just arrived, fresh out of training and abuzz with the excitement of his first real posting - not least because he is to serve under Stanhope, his former school house monitor and the object of his sister's affections. Each man is trapped, the days ticking by, the tension rising and the attack drawing ever closer.

programme.title: Alone in Berlin
programme.desc: This true-life tale of courage unfolds against the tumultuous backdrop of Berlin in 1940. Otto and Anna Quangel are a working class husband and wife doing their best to ride out the war. When their son is killed fighting on the frontlines, however, everything changes. They begin pouring their rage and grief into postcards emblazoned with anti-Nazi slogans, risking everything to disseminate their messages of protest across the city. But this seemingly small act of subversion rattles the regime, including a police inspector who will not rest until the culprits have been caught.

programme.title: Film Stars Don't Die in Liverpool
programme.desc: Based on Peter Turner's memoir, the film follows the playful but passionate relationship between Turner and the eccentric Academy Award-Winning Actress Gloria Grahame in 1978 Liverpool. What starts as a vibrant affair between a legendary femme fatale and her young lover quickly grows into a deeper relationship, with Turner being the person Gloria turns to for comfort. Their passion and lust for life is tested to the limits by events beyond their control.

programme.title: 6 Days
programme.desc: The incredible true story of six days of terror, after six heavily-armed gunmen invade the Iranian Embassy in London in 1980 and take 26 people hostage.

programme.title: Love and Friendship
programme.desc: Set in the 1790s, earlier than most Austen tales, this film concerns beautiful young widow Lady Susan Vernon who has come to Churchill, the estate of her in-laws, to wait out colourful rumours about her dalliances circulating through polite society. While ensconced there, she decides to secure a husband for herself and for her daughter, Frederica. The waters are troubled by the arrival at Churchill of the handsome, eligible Reginald DeCourcy and silly but cheerful, and very rich, Sir James Martin.

programme.title: How to Talk to Girls at Parties
programme.desc: An alien touring the galaxy breaks away from her group and meets two young inhabitants of the most dangerous place in the universe: the London suburb of Croydon.

programme.title: What We Did on Our Holiday
programme.desc: Doug and Abi are taking their three children on a trip to Scotland for a big family gathering. What starts as a vibrant affair between a legendary femme fatale and her young lover quickly grows into a deeper relationship, with Turner being the person Gloria turns to for comfort. programme.title: 6 Days
programme.desc: The incredible true story of six days of terror, after six heavily-armed gunmen invade the Iranian Embassy in London in 1980 and take 26 people hostage.

programme.title: Death Defying Acts
programme.desc: It is 1926 and escape artist Harry Houdini is the most famous performer in the world. The only thing he is unable to escape is the death of his beloved mother. Obsessed with connecting with her in the afterlife, he offers $10,000 to anyone who can reveal her dying words to him - something only he knows. Enter the beautiful but deceptive Mary and what begins as a con evolves into a far more dangerous affair as Houdini is overwhelmed by Mary's mysterious charm. As the stakes get higher, it soon becomes a question of who is out-conning who - when the biggest risk is falling in love.

programme.title: The Man Who Invented Christmas
programme.desc: The tale of the magical journey that led to the creation of A Christmas Carol, forever changing the holiday season we celebrate.

programme.title: Last Days In The Desert
programme.desc: An imagined chapter from Jesus' forty days of fasting and praying in the desert. On his way out of the wilderness, Jesus struggles with the Devil over the fate of a family in crisis.

programme.title: Brooklyn
programme.desc: Brooklyn tells the profoundly moving story of Eilis Lacey, a young Irish immigrant navigating her way through 1950s Brooklyn. Lured by the promise of America, Eilis departs Ireland and the comfort of her mother's home for the shores of New York City. The initial shackles of homesickness quickly diminish as a fresh romance sweeps Eilis into the intoxicating charm of love. But soon, her new vivacity is disrupted by her past, and Eilis must choose between two countries and the lives that exist within.

programme.title: Six Minutes to Midnight
programme.desc: Seventeen days before WWII, a teacher must try to exonerate himself in time to save the hearts and minds of his students from the grip of Hitler.

programme.title: A Little Chaos
programme.desc: This period drama tells the tale of two landscape artists who become romantically involved while constructing the grand gardens at King Louis XIV's palace at Versailles.

programme.title: The Liability
programme.desc: UK. A weary assassin hires a gangster's cocky stepson as his driver to show him the ropes. But a stunning woman upsets the applecart after a hit in this witty caper.

programme.title: Death Defying Acts
programme.desc: It is 1926 and escape artist Harry Houdini is the most famous performer in the world. The only thing he is unable to escape is the death of his beloved mother. programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: An undocumented Filipino immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home, securing a better future for her family, but a dark discovery threatens to destroy everything.

programme.desc: Seventeen days before WWII, a teacher must try to exonerate himself in time to save the hearts and minds of his students from the grip of Hitler.

programme.title: A Little Chaos
programme.desc: This period drama tells the tale of two landscape artists who become romantically involved while constructing the grand gardens at King Louis XIV's palace at Versailles.

programme.title: The Liability
programme.desc: UK. A weary assassin hires a gangster's cocky stepson as his driver to show him the ropes. But a stunning woman upsets the applecart after a hit in this witty caper.

programme.title: My Generation
programme.desc: British film icon Michael Caine narrates and stars in My Generation, the vivid and inspiring story of his personal journey through 1960s London. Based on personal accounts and stunning archive footage this documentary sees Caine travel back in time to talk to The Beatles, Twiggy, David Bailey, Mary Quant, The Rolling Stones, David Hockney and others. The film has been painstakingly assembled over the last six years by Caine working with Producer Simon Fuller, Writers Dick Clement and Ian La Frenais and Director David Batty to tell the story of the birth of pop culture in London, through the eyes of the young Michael Caine: "For the first time in history the young working class stood up for ourselves and said, were here, this is our society and we're not going away!"

programme.title: Hyde Park on Hudson
programme.desc: A historical tale that uniquely explores the all-too-human side of one of history's iconic leaders. Blending literate wit and drama, Hyde Park on Hudson is directed by Roger Michell from a screenplay by Richard Nelson. In June 1939, President Franklin Delano Roosevelt readies to host the King and Queen of England for a weekend at the Roosevelt home at Hyde Park on Hudson, in upstate New York - marking the first-ever visit of a reigning British monarch to America. As Britain faces imminent war with Germany, the royals are desperately looking to FDR for U.S. support. But international affairs must be juggled with the complexities of FDR's domestic establishment, as his wife Eleanor, mother Sara, and secretary Missy will all play a part in making the royal weekend an unforgettable one. Seen through the eyes of Daisy, Franklin's neighbour and intimate, the weekend will produce not only a special relationship between two great nations, but, for Daisy - and through her, for us all - a deeper understanding of the mysteries of love and friendship.

programme.title: Summerland
programme.desc: During World War II, an Englishwoman opens her heart to an evacuee after initially resolving to be rid of him in this moving journey of womanhood, love and friendship.

programme.title: Beast
programme.desc: Moll is 27 and still living at home, stifled by the small island community around her and too beholden to her family to break away. When she meets Pascal, a free-spirited stranger, a whole new world opens up to her and she begins to feel alive for the first time, falling madly in love. Finally breaking free from her family, Moll moves in with Pascal to start a new life. But when he is arrested as the key suspect in a series of brutal murders, she is left isolated and afraid. Choosing to stand with him against the suspicions of the community, Moll finds herself forced to make choices that will impact her life forever.

programme.title: Mr. Holmes
programme.desc: A different twist on the world's most famous detective. 1947, an ageing Sherlock Holmes returns from a journey to Japan, where, in search of a rare plant with powerful restorative qualities, he has witnessed the devastation of nuclear warfare. Grappling with the diminishing powers of his mind, Holmes comes to rely upon his housekeeper's boy as he revisits the circumstances of the unsolved case that forced him into retirement, and searches for answers to the mysteries of life and love before it's too late.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The extraordinary and epic true story of Eric Lomax, a British Army officer who is tormented as a prisoner of war at a Japanese labour camp during World War II. Decades later, Lomax and his beautiful love interest, Patti, discover that the Japanese interpreter responsible for much of his treatment is still alive. They set out to confront him, and Eric's haunting past, in this powerful and inspiring tale of heroism, humanity and the redeeming power of love.

programme.title: Age of Heroes
programme.desc: Sean Bean and Danny Dyer star in this action adventure which documents the true story of the elite 30 Commando unit, formed during World War II by the man who would later become novelist Ian Fleming, and their risky mission in Norway. Corporal Bob Rains (Danny Dyer), noted by top military brass for his potential, is drafted into the 30 Commando unit, put together by intelligence operative Lieutenant Commander Ian Fleming (James D'Arcy) to obtain vital German intelligence information. Rains and the other 30 Commando team members, led by Major Jones (Sean Bean) prepare for a dangerous mission to Norway, where the Germans have hidden their valuable radar technology, which, if captured by the Allies, will debilitate the enemy's chances of winning the war. After parachuting into the snowy Norwegian countryside, the 30 Commandos must put their skills to the test, as they battle fierce German opposition, the unrelenting cold and a problem with their return transport, which sees them struggle.

programme.title: My Generation
programme.desc: British film icon Michael Caine narrates and stars in My Generation, the vivid and inspiring story of his personal journey through 1960s London. Based on personal accounts and stunning archive footage this documentary sees Caine travel back in time to talk to The Beatles, Twiggy, David Bailey, Mary Quant, The Rolling Stones, David Hockney and others. The film has been painstakingly assembled over the last six years by Caine working with Producer Simon Fuller, Writers Dick Clement and Ian La Frenais and Director David Batty to tell the story of the birth of pop culture in London, through the eyes of the young Michael Caine: "For the first time in history the young working class stood up for ourselves and said, were here, this is our society and we're not going away!"

programme.title: Fish Tank
programme.desc: This BAFTA-winning raw drama stars Katie Jarvis in her debut role as Mia, a volatile 15-year-old, who is always in trouble as she has been excluded from school and is ostracised by her friends. When her mother (Kierston Wareing) brings home Connor (Michael Fassbender), a mysterious stranger, a change to their lives looks promising. Trivia: Katie Jarvis lives on an Essex housing estate like the one in the movie, and she was discovered by director Andrea Arnold while in a shouting match with her boyfriend at the Tilbury train station, which is seen in the movie. Now 18, she gave birth to a daughter conceived when she was 16.

After parachuting into the snowy Norwegian countryside, the 30 Commandos must put their skills to the test, as they battle fierce German opposition, the unrelenting cold and a problem with their return transport, which sees them struggle.

programme.title: Swimming with Men
programme.desc: Faced with a full-blown mid-life crisis, accountant Eric joins an all-male group of synchronised swimmers, discovering that making patterns in a pool can, for a couple of hours at least, smooth out the bumps in his work and marriage. Initially keeping their personal lives in the locker, the ramshackle squad and coach Susan slowly learn to reveal their inner lives, as well as their paunches. But can they get their lives and routines in sync as they embark on an unlikely journey to Milan to compete in the World Championship?

programme.title: A Bump Along The Way
programme.desc: After a drunken one-night stand, 44-year-old single mother Pamela finds herself pregnant. Her tightly wound teen daughter, Allegra, is ashamed of her deadbeat mum and the two must find a way to deal with the unexpected news. In amongst the family farce, Pamela must consult the father, Allegra must deal with her high school bullies, and together they must find common ground before the baby is born.

programme.title: Attack the Block
programme.desc: A gang of tough inner-city kids try to defend their turf against an invasion of savage alien creatures, turning a South London apartment complex into an extraterrestrial war zone.

programme.title: Sometimes Always Never
programme.desc: The film focuses on scrabble-obsessed Merseyside tailor Alan, whose eldest son Michael stormed out of the house after a particularly heated round of the popular board game, never to return. Years later, Alan and his other son Peter continue the search while trying to repair their own strained relationship.

programme.title: Bend It Like Beckham
programme.desc: An Indian family in London tries to raise their soccer-playing daughter in a traditional way. Unlike her older sister, who is preparing for a lavish Indian wedding and a lifetime of cooking delicious dishes, Jess dreams of playing soccer professionally, like her hero, British soccer superstar, David Beckham. Wholeheartedly against Jess's unorthodox ambition, her parents eventually reveal that their reservations have more to do with protecting her than with holding her back. When Jess is forced to make a choice between tradition and her beloved sport, her family must decide whether to let her chase her dream, and a soccer ball.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: A dignified send-off for a loved one erupts into uproarious chaos when a myriad of outrageous calamities befall the eccentric, grief-stricken mourners. The death of Daniel and Robert's father brings their entire dysfunctional family together to mourn his passing. When a man shows up at the funeral threatening to reveal the deceased man's shocking secret unless he gets some cash, the two brothers are forced to figure out a way to deal with the blackmailer. As they pull out every stop to try and prevent any news from spreading to the guests, the ceremony turns into complete chaos.

programme.title: A Guide To Second Date Sex
programme.desc: Laura and Ryan have been totally destroyed by previous relationships. In the hope of getting it right, they go on a second date having no idea what they're supposed to do.

programme.title: Swimming with Men
programme.desc: Faced with a full-blown mid-life crisis, accountant Eric joins an all-male group of synchronised swimmers, discovering that making patterns in a pool can, for a couple of hours at least, smooth out the bumps in his work and marriage. Initially keeping their personal lives in the locker, the ramshackle squad and coach Susan slowly learn to reveal their inner lives, as well as their paunches. But can they get their lives and routines in sync as they embark on an unlikely journey to Milan to compete in the World Championship?

programme.title: Ammonite
programme.desc: In 1840s England, acclaimed but overlooked fossil hunter Mary Anning and a young woman sent to convalesce by the sea develop an intense relationship, altering both of their lives forever.

programme.title: High-Rise
programme.desc: Laing is a surgeon who moves into a tower on the outskirts of London. The brutalist brainchild of architect Royal, it offers residents everything they need, except contact with the outside world. When the concrete monolith's electrical circuits malfunction, so does the moral compass of everyone inside. Decadence and depravity become the new norm. Fighting and fornication are rampant and warfare between lower and upper floors erupts, while murder barely raises an eyebrow. Amid the chaos, the stinging sociopolitical satire about the thin line between human advancement and de-evolution of the species is unavoidable.

programme.title: Mary Shelley
programme.desc: Mary Shelley tells the story of Mary Wollstonecraft Godwin, author of the famous Gothic novels "Frankenstein", and her fiery relationship with renowned romantic poet Percy Bysshe Shelley. The pair are two outsiders constrained by society but bound together by progressive ideas that are beyond the boundaries of their age and time.

programme.title: Toast
programme.desc: Bittersweet story of a food writer's road to adulthood via his association with culinary tastes and smells. A delicious love letter to set to the songs of Dusty Springfield.

programme.title: Bend It Like Beckham
programme.desc: An Indian family in London tries to raise their soccer-playing daughter in a traditional way. Unlike her older sister, who is preparing for a lavish Indian wedding and a lifetime of cooking delicious dishes, Jess dreams of playing soccer professionally, like her hero, British soccer superstar, David Beckham. Wholeheartedly against Jess's unorthodox ambition, her parents eventually reveal that their reservations have more to do with protecting her than with holding her back. When Jess is forced to make a choice between tradition and her beloved sport, her family must decide whether to let her chase her dream, and a soccer ball.

The death of Daniel and Robert's father brings their entire dysfunctional family together to mourn his passing. As they pull out every stop to try and prevent any news from spreading to the guests, the ceremony turns into complete chaos.

programme.title: A Guide To Second Date Sex
programme.desc: Laura and Ryan have been totally destroyed by previous relationships. In the hope of getting it right, they go on a second date having no idea what they're supposed to do.

programme.title: The Miracle Club
programme.desc: Four women set out on a journey to Lourdes while confronting their pasts in search of a miracle.

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: A group of aliens bestow upon a random Earthling the ability to make absolutely anything happen, to see if he uses the power for good or for evil.

programme.title: Cheri
programme.desc: This is the sensual story of an extraordinary love affair between beautiful retired courtesan Lea and exquisitely handsome and cheeky Cheri. The spoilt son of her old colleague and rival, Madame Peloux, Lea sets out to educate the boy in the ways of love and they embark on a journey steeped in lust, jealousy and desire.

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: This film follows Britain's iconic prime minister, Winston Churchill, in the days before the D-day landings in June 1944. As Allied forces stand on the south coast of Britain, poised to invade Nazi-occupied Europe, they await Churchill's decision on whether the invasion will actually move ahead. Fearful of repeating his mistakes from WWI on the beaches of Gallipoli, exhausted by years of war, plagued by depression and obsessed with fulfilling historical greatness, Churchill is also faced with constant criticism from his political opponents, General Eisenhower and Field Marshal Montgomery.

programme.title: McClaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.title: Red Joan
programme.desc: English born Joan Stanley, a Soviet and communist party sympathizer, becomes employed as a British government civil servant, and gets recruited by the KGB in the mid 1930s. She successfully transfers nuclear bomb secrets to the Soviet Union (Russia), which enables them to keep up with the west in the development of atomic weapons, and remains undetected as a spy for over a half a century.

programme.title: Nowhere Boy
programme.desc: Biopic of John Lennon's early life. Abandoned by his mother and raised by a prim and proper aunt, the rebellious teen is soon drawn to rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: The Miracle Club
programme.desc: Four women set out on a journey to Lourdes while confronting their pasts in search of a miracle.

programme.title: 44 Inch Chest
programme.desc: Colin (Ray Winstone) is in agony, shattered by his wife's (Joanne Whalley) infidelity. However, he has friends who do more than stand by - they kidnap the wife's French lover and hold him prisoner so that Colin can restore his manhood with revenge. A kangaroo court takes place and as the situation Colin wrestles with remorse, grief and self pity, all the while egged on by his motley crew of friends who just want him to get on with it.

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: A group of aliens bestow upon a random Earthling the ability to make absolutely anything happen, to see if he uses the power for good or for evil.

programme.title: Cheri
programme.desc: This is the sensual story of an extraordinary love affair between beautiful retired courtesan Lea and exquisitely handsome and cheeky Cheri. programme.title: McClaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.title: Nowhere Boy
programme.desc: Biopic of John Lennon's early life. Abandoned by his mother and raised by a prim and proper aunt, the rebellious teen is soon drawn to rock 'n' roll.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part II
programme.desc: Daniel, now a karate champ, goes to Okinawa with Mr Miyagi, his mentor. Miyagi rekindles an old flame while Daniel finds love, and enemies, of his own.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part III
programme.desc: A bad guy from the original Karate Kid plots revenge on young Daniel and his mentor Miyagi after they defeat his karate school and ruin his business.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: Stranded 205,000 miles from Earth in a crippled spacecraft, astronauts Jim Lovell, Fred Haise and Jack Swigert fight a desperate battle to survive. Meanwhile, at Mission Control, astronaut Ken Mattingly, flight director Gene Kranz and a heroic ground crew race against time - and the odds - to bring them home.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: An undercover cop is posing as a kindergarten teacher in order to catch a dangerous criminal. Once he wrangles his young charges, as well as the affections of a beautiful teacher, he prepares for a final showdown with his intended prey in this totally enjoyable action-comedy.

programme.title: Planes, Trains & Automobiles
programme.desc: Businessman Neal is dying to get home for Thanksgiving and loud-mouthed Del, a shower curtain ring salesman is driving him nuts. Will they reach Chicago without killing each other?

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger
programme.desc: Jack Ryan is called into action when a prominent businessman, who may be connected to Colombian drug cartels, is murdered.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (1984)
programme.desc: A new kid in town who is picked on by bullies learns karate and eastern philosophy from Mr Miyagi, and learns how to fight back.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part II
programme.desc: Daniel, now a karate champ, goes to Okinawa with Mr Miyagi, his mentor. Miyagi rekindles an old flame while Daniel finds love, and enemies, of his own.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part III
programme.desc: A bad guy from the original Karate Kid plots revenge on young Daniel and his mentor Miyagi after they defeat his karate school and ruin his business.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: An undercover cop is posing as a kindergarten teacher in order to catch a dangerous criminal. Once he wrangles his young charges, as well as the affections of a beautiful teacher, he prepares for a final showdown with his intended prey in this totally enjoyable action-comedy.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger
programme.desc: Jack Ryan is called into action when a prominent businessman, who may be connected to Colombian drug cartels, is murdered.

programme.title: The Untouchables
programme.desc: A veteran cop who joins forces with an upstart lawman to take down prohibition gangster Al Capone.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: Marty McFly, a typical American teenager of the 1980s, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered DeLorean time machine, invented by a slightly mad scientist. During his often hysterical but amazing trip back in time, Marty must make certain his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so that he can get back to the future.

programme.title: The Meaning of Life
programme.desc: The Monty Python team tackle this weighty subject in a series of sketches involving body parts, religion, the wonders of war, the miracle of birth, and a preview of what awaits in heaven.

programme.title: Coming to America
programme.desc: Join an African Prince on an unforgettable comic quest to the New World, it's time for him to find a princess and the mission leads him and his most loyal friends to Queens, New York. In disguise as an impoverished immigrant, the pampered prince quickly finds himself a new job, new friends, new digs, new enemies and lots of trouble.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: The Untouchables
programme.desc: A veteran cop who joins forces with an upstart lawman to take down prohibition gangster Al Capone.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

In disguise as an impoverished immigrant, the pampered prince quickly finds himself a new job, new friends, new digs, new enemies and lots of trouble.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: K-9
programme.desc: An unorthodox narcotics cop teams with an independently minded police dog in this hilarious action-comedy. Headstrong Dooley is one step away from nailing a prominent socialite in a $50 million cocaine bust. He's branded as too crazy to partner with, and no one will work with him except Jerry Lee, a superbly trained German shepherd police dog with the best nose in the drug-busting business. The unconventional pairing pleases neither partner, but after a series of shootouts, stakeouts, brawls and romantic misadventures, they develop a grudging respect for each other. It's a heart-warming, fast-footed adventure about an unlikely and unbeatable police team that will have you rooting for man's best friend.

programme.title: Back To The Future III
programme.desc: Marty McFly ends up in the wild west of 1885 to save mad scientist Doc Brown from a crazed gunfighter.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: What would you do if you knew that in a handful of days an enormous commit would collide with Earth and all humanity could be annihilated? The countdown to doomsday is underway in this exciting sci-fi action. Oceans will rise, cities will fall and hope will survive. DEEP IMPACT makes its effect felt in a big and unforgettable way.

programme.title: Twelve Monkeys
programme.desc: Cole is sent back in time to save the human race from a deadly virus that has forced mankind into dank underground communities in the future. Along his travels, he encounters a psychiatrist and a mental patient who may hold the key to the mysterious rogue group, the Army of the 12 Monkeys, thought to be responsible for unleashing the killer disease. Believing he can obtain a pure virus sample in order to find a cure in the future, he is met with one riddle after another that puts him in a race with time.

programme.title: Carlito's Way
programme.desc: A former drug kingpin Carlito Brigante is sprung from prison by his high-powered attorney. He stuns the New York underworld by vowing to go straight from a history of violence, but his plans are undermined by misguided loyalties and an outmoded code of honour. In a life-or-death battle, Carlito takes on the relentless forces that refuse to let him go.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot who survives a near-fatal accident, returns home to find out that has been replaced by a duplicate version of himself.

programme.title: K-9
programme.desc: An unorthodox narcotics cop teams with an independently minded police dog in this hilarious action-comedy. Headstrong Dooley is one step away from nailing a prominent socialite in a $50 million cocaine bust. He's branded as too crazy to partner with, and no one will work with him except Jerry Lee, a superbly trained German shepherd police dog with the best nose in the drug-busting business. programme.title: Back To The Future III
programme.desc: Marty McFly ends up in the wild west of 1885 to save mad scientist Doc Brown from a crazed gunfighter.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: Dr Sherman Klump, a kind, calorically challenged genetics professor who longs to shed his 400-pound frame in order to win the heart of the beautiful Carla Purty. So, with one swig of his experimental fat-reducing serum, Sherman becomes Buddy Love, a fast-talking, pumped up, plumped-down Don Juan. Can Sherman stop his buff alter ego before it's too late, or will Buddy have the last laugh?

programme.title: Groundhog Day
programme.desc: Bill Murray is at his wry, wisecracking best in this riotous romantic comedy about a weatherman caught in a personal time warp on the worst day of his life. Teamed with a relentlessly cheerful producer and a smart-aleck cameraman, TV weatherman Phil Connors is sent to Punxsutawney, Pennsylvania, to cover the annual Groundhog Day festivities.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Two country handymen who lead a cast of zany characters to safety in this exciting sci-fi creature adventure. Just as Val McKee and Earl Basset decide to leave Perfection, Nevada, strange rumblings prevent their departure. With the help of a shapely seismology student, they discover their desolate town is infested with gigantic man-eating creatures that live below the ground. The race is on to overcome these slimy subterraneans and find a way to higher ground.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two Miami cops must find $100 million in stolen heroin before their department is shut down. With time running out, detectives Burnett and Lowrey track a master thief into the Miami underworld, dodging bullets and bad guys along the way. A sexy witness can identify the suspect, but a mix-up causes her to believe Burnett is Lowrey, forcing the partners to switch identities. Now, between shoot-outs and car chases, married man Burnett has to stick close to their only witness, while playboy Lowrey goes home to his partner's wife and kids to learn the joys of parenthood - the hard way.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Flying High
programme.desc: Robert Hays stars as an ex-fighter pilot forced to take over the controls of an airliner when the flight crew succumbs to food poisoning; Julie Hagerty as his girlfriend/stewardess/co-pilot; and a cast of all-stars including Robert Stack, Lloyd Bridges and Leslie Nielsen. Their hilarious high jinx spoof airplane disaster flicks, religious zealots, television commercials, and romantic love the lists whirls by in rapid succession. And the story races from one moment of zany fun to the next!

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: In this suspenseful action tale Jean-Claude Van Damme stars at Darren McCord, a retired fire fighter whose daughter is caught up in a terrorist's audacious plan to take out 17,000 hockey fans, including the VP, unless his insane financial demands are met.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Bad Boys 2
programme.desc: Burnett and Lowrey reunite as out-of-control, trash-talking cops. Bullets fly, cars crash, and laughs explode as they pursue a whacked-out drug lord from the streets of Miami to the barrios of Cuba.

programme.title: Planes, Trains & Automobiles
programme.desc: Businessman Neal is dying to get home for Thanksgiving and loud-mouthed Del, a shower curtain ring salesman is driving him nuts. Will they reach Chicago without killing each other?

programme.title: Out of Sight
programme.desc: Meet Jack Foley, the most successful bank robber in the country. On the day he busts out of jail, he finds himself stealing something far more precious than money. Karen Siscos heart. She's smart. She's sexy. And unfortunately for Jack, she's a Federal Marshall. Now, they're willing to risk it all to find out if there's more between them than just the law.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Forced into slavery by the corrupt heir to the throne, Roman general Maximus becomes a gladiator. His prowess in the arena leads him to Rome, the Colosseum, and a showdown with the new emperor.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: After being captured by Turks during the Crusades, Robin of Locksley and a Moor, Azeem, escape back to England where Azeem vows to remain until he repays Robin for saving his life. Meanwhile, Robin's father has been murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham and when Robin returns home he vows to avenge his father's death. Even though Marian, his childhood friend, cannot help him, he escapes to the Forest of Sherwood where he joins a band of exiled villagers and becomes their leader. With their help he attempts to cleanse the land of the evil that the Sheriff has spread.

programme.title: Repo Man
programme.desc: Alex Cox directs what is now a considered a classic punk fable where Emilio Estevez stars as Otto, a newly hired repossession man who somehow becomes the partner of Bud, an old hand in the repo business, portrayed by the wonderful Harry Dean Stanton. Otto then becomes swept up in a web of intrigue concerning a huge repossession bounty on a 1964 Chevy Malibu. Bizarre events ensue leading Otto and Bud to an encounter with what seem to be beings from space. This off-beat film has a little of everything: action, comedy, urban decay, police drama, mystery, government conspiracy and even UFOs! A cult classic!

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: The story of an all-American girls' professional baseball league formed in 1943 when the men were away at war.

programme.title: The Untouchables
programme.desc: A veteran cop who joins forces with an upstart lawman to take down prohibition gangster Al Capone.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (1984)
programme.desc: A new kid in town who is picked on by bullies learns karate and eastern philosophy from Mr Miyagi, and learns how to fight back.
